body:
## Goal

Extend the proven #2877 pattern to the next tier of high-GSC / LLM-gap drummer profiles. The `drummer-head-term LLM gap` learned pattern confirms: gear table alone ≠ LLM-citable. A profile must include ≥1 prose Kit Overview paragraph (150-200w) using both 'drum kit' + 'drum set' phrasing to be extracted by LLM providers.

**#2877 (batch 1)** shipped 2026-06-27: Lars Ulrich, Mike Portnoy, Danny Carey, Dave Lombardo, Gene Hoglan. This is **batch 2** for the next-priority tier.

## Target Drummers

All 5 have confirmed active GSC signals (impressions ≥8 this week) and are likely missing Kit Overview prose:

| Drummer | GSC Signal | Why Priority |
|---|---|---|
| **Brann Dailor** | pos 6.3 / 23 impr / 0 cl | Highest-volume CTR gap — CTR fix (#2928) ships first, prose reinforces LLM citation |
| **Vinnie Paul** | pos 10.4 / 22 impr / 0 cl | Large impression volume, zero clicks |
| **Eloy Casagrande** | pos 8.6 / 19 impr / 1 cl | Sepultura/Slayer — strong metal authority signal |
| **Shannon Larkin** | pos 4.8 / 13 impr / 0 cl | CTR gap entity (#2927); prose helps LLM citation beyond CTR fix |
| **Matt Halpern** | pos 9.3 / 8 impr + 2 other active queries | 3 active GSC queries simultaneously |

## Action

For each drummer slug, check if `/drummer/<slug>` profile already has a prose Kit Overview section (≥100w paragraph describing their signature sound, kit setup philosophy, specific gear highlights using both 'drum kit' + 'drum set' phrasing). If missing, add one.

**Format** (same as #2877 batch):
- 150-200 words
- Uses both 'drum kit' and 'drum set' in natural flow
- Mentions 2-3 specific gear items (snare model, cymbal brand, bass drum brand)
- Cites band/album context for authority
- Added below the gear table, above related articles

Also add/update the `/public/llms/<slug>.md` entity file for each drummer with a Kit Overview section if it exists.

## Verify

After ship, spot-check Perplexity for:
- 'what drum kit does brann dailor use'
- 'vinnie paul drum setup'
- 'eloy casagrande drum kit'

## Done

All 5 profiles have prose Kit Overview ≥150w. LLM entity files updated where applicable.

---
*L2 verifier: LLM citations umbrella #2211 · Pattern: `drummer-head-term LLM gap` in learned-patterns.md · Batch 1: #2877 (shipped 2026-06-27)*
title: feat(llm): Add prose Kit Overview section to batch 2 of LLM-gap drummer profiles — Brann Dailor, Vinnie Paul, Eloy Casagrande, Shannon Larkin, Matt Halpern
